summary: Indonesia’s sovereign wealth fund Danantara has finalized the merger of four local firms to create the nation’s largest asset manager as it seeks to compete more effectively with financial institutions across the region.

title: Iranian Oil at Sea Left in Limbo After US Revokes 60-Day Waiver
title_cn: 美国撤销 60 天豁免后，伊朗海上石油陷入困境
summary: Tens of millions of barrels of Iranian oil already on tankers have been left in limbo after the US walked back a waiver allowing the Islamic Republic to sell the crude.

title: US Blocks Oil Sales in New Test of Ceasefire
title_cn: 美国阻止石油销售是停火的新考验
summary: The US carried out a new round of strikes in Iran targeting more than 80 sites and revoked a waiver allowing new sales of Iranian oil, further imperiling a peace agreement after a series of attacks on ships in the Strait of Hormuz. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Strikes Iran and Blocks Oil Sales in New Test of Ceasefire
title_cn: 美国打击伊朗并阻止石油销售，这是停火的新考验
summary: The US carried out a new round of strikes in Iran targeting more than 80 sites and revoked a waiver allowing new sales of its oil, further imperiling a peace agreement after a series of attacks on ships in the Strait of Hormuz.

title: Oil Climbs as US Strikes Targets in Iran Following Ship Attacks
title_cn: 美国在船只袭击后袭击伊朗目标，油价上涨
summary: Oil jumped as the US struck targets in Iran in retaliation for attacks on shipping in the Strait of Hormuz, ramping up regional tensions.

title: Thai SEC Weighs Legal Action Against Major True Corp. Investor
title_cn: 泰国证券交易委员会考虑对 True Corp. 主要投资者采取法律行动
summary: Thailand’s market regulator is considering legal action against an investor over inconsistencies in seven disclosure reports linked to six listed companies, including a nearly $1 billion acquisition of shares in telecom giant True Corp.

title: BHP Workers to Strike at World’s Biggest Iron Ore Export Port
title_cn: 必和必拓工人将在全球最大铁矿石出口港口举行罢工
summary: Workers at BHP Group’s Port Hedland iron ore export terminal in Western Australia will stage an eight-hour strike on July 16, unions said, after failing to reach agreement with the company in more than six months of talks.

title: Indonesia Faces Possible Cut to Frontier Market by S&P Dow Jones
title_cn: 印度尼西亚可能面临标普道琼斯对前沿市场的削减
summary: Indonesia’s stocks fell after S&P Dow Jones Indices signaled the country could eventually lose its emerging-market status if concerns over its equities market persist, dealing a setback to efforts to reassure global investors.

title: KKR-Backed SmartHR Is Said to Delay Tokyo IPO Beyond This Year
title_cn: KKR 支持的 SmartHR 据称将推迟今年东京首次公开募股
summary: Japanese human resources platform operator SmartHR Inc. has delayed its plans for an initial public offering to next year at the earliest as investors viewed the company’s targeted valuation as too high, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Indonesia Selloff Lures $29 Billion South African Money Manager
title_cn: 印尼抛售吸引南非基金经理 290 亿美元
summary: A selloff in Indonesian assets that accelerated during the Iran war has created a buying opportunity, prompting a South African money manager with $29 billion in assets to enter the market.

title: Oil Rises With Bond Yields After US Attack on Iran: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 美国袭击伊朗后油价随债券收益率上涨：市场结束
summary: Oil prices rose while bonds retreated across most of Asia as renewed Middle East tensions sparked fears of energy supply disruptions, complicating the outlook for inflation and interest rates.

title: GM-Backed Momenta Rises in HK Debut After $752 Million IPO
title_cn: 通用汽车支持的 Momenta 在香港首次公开募股 7.52 亿美元后股价上涨
summary: Momenta Global Ltd., a Chinese autonomous-driving firm, rose as much as 6.5% in Hong Kong on Wednesday after raising HK$5.9 billion ($752 million) in an initial public offering that’s a test of market appetite for loss-making firms that offer promising technologies.

title: Pemex Former CEO Victor Rodríguez Detained, El Universal Says
title_cn: El Universal 称墨西哥国家石油公司前首席执行官维克多·罗德里格斯被拘留
summary: Former Pemex Chief Executive Officer Victor Rodríguez was detained by authorities in Mexico City’s Benito Juarez borough on Tuesday, outlet El Universal reported citing the National Registry of Detentions.

title: Temasek-Backed Foundation Healthcare Debuts Flat in Singapore
title_cn: 淡马锡支持的医疗保健基金会在新加坡首次亮相
summary: Foundation Healthcare Holdings Ltd opened unchanged from its initial public offering price on Wednesday in Singapore after a listing that was the largest of the year so far in the city state outside real estate investment trusts.

title: Gold Steadies After Fresh US Strikes in Iran Cloud Rate Outlook
title_cn: 美国对伊朗进行新一轮打击后，金价稳定 云利率前景
summary: Gold traded in a narrow range as investors sought clues on the Federal Reserve’s outlook for interest rates, with renewed US airstrikes on Iran stoking concerns around a return to higher energy prices and inflation.

title: S&P Dow Jones Warns of Potential Frontier-Market Cut for Turkey
title_cn: 标准普尔道琼斯警告土耳其可能削减前沿市场
summary: S&P Dow Jones Indices put Turkey on a watchlist for a potential cut to frontier-market status, joining MSCI Inc. in warning of downgrades.

title: US Strikes Iran and Blocks Oil Sales
title_cn: 美国打击伊朗并阻止石油销售
summary: The US launched airstrikes in Iran and revoked a waiver that allowed it to sell oil globally, further imperiling a peace agreement after a series of attacks on ships in the Strait of Hormuz. Bloomberg's Nick Wadhams breaks down the latest developments. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Canada Offers Teck C$400 Million for Strategic Metals Growth
title_cn: 加拿大向 Teck 提供 4 亿加元用于战略金属增长
summary: The Canadian government will contribute as much as C$400 million ($282 million) to Teck Resources Ltd.’s plans to boost output at a key metals refinery, creating a deal that could ensure the country receives a portion of future germanium, antimony and gallium supply.

title: Sumitomo Mitsui Trust Inks $2 Billion Partnership With Morrison
title_cn: 三井住友信托与莫里森签署价值 20 亿美元的合作协议
summary: Sumitomo Mitsui Trust Bank will take a 15% stake in New Zealand-based infrastructure investor Morrison, as part of a new strategic partnership to provide its Japanese customers access to fresh investment opportunities.

title: Exxon Sees $3.7 Billion Profit Surge From War-Driven Oil Rally
title_cn: 埃克森美孚因战争驱动的石油上涨而利润激增 37 亿美元
summary: ExxonMobil Holdings Corp. said second-quarter earnings jumped by almost $4 billion as the Iran conflict boosted oil prices.

title: US Judge Rejects DOJ Subpoena Over 2020 Georgia Election
title_cn: 美国法官驳回司法部就 2020 年佐治亚州选举发出的传票
summary: A federal judge rejected an effort by the US Justice Department to obtain information on election workers in Fulton County, Georgia, related to the 2020 vote.

title: Operations Platform SnowCloud Wants to Run Resorts By iPhone
title_cn: 运营平台 SnowCloud 希望通过 iPhone 运营度假村
summary: Joe Hession, CEO and co-founder of SnowCloud, and Doug Pierini, CEO of Jackson Hole Mountain Resort, discussed efforts to move customer relations including sales and guest information on one platform. Pierini, whose resort uses SnowCloud, said that it has enhanced guest experiences now that guests expect to be able to buy anywhere they can use their phone.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Amazon’s New Bonds Get Cooler Reception as AI Debt Floods Market
title_cn: 随着人工智能债务涌入市场，亚马逊的新债券受到冷遇
summary: When Amazon.com Inc. sold its biggest ever bond earlier this year, it was inundated with investor orders amid hype about the artificial intelligence boom. This time around there’s less fanfare.

title: 【今朝の5本】仕事を始める前に読んでおきたい厳選ニュース
title_cn: 【今早5篇】精选上班前必读新闻
summary: 石油販売認める措置撤回、スペースX株に強気、SKハイニックス、アマゾン起債へ、米インフレ期待

title: Allstate Sued by Oklahoma for Alleged Scheme to Underpay Claims
title_cn: 好事达因涉嫌少付索赔而被俄克拉荷马州起诉
summary: Oklahoma’s attorney general sued Allstate Corp., alleging the insurer schemed to minimize payouts to homeowners for wind and hailstorm damage in order to boost its profits.

title: Tech Rout Deepens as Chipmakers Fall; SpaceX Gets Bullish Calls
title_cn: 随着芯片制造商的衰落，技术溃败加剧； SpaceX 受到看好
summary: US technology shares declined on Tuesday after earnings from Samsung Electronics Co. failed to satisfy investors, spurring worries over the durability of this year’s red-hot artificial intelligence trade.

title: Chip Stocks Sink After Blistering Run as Oil Jumps: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 随着石油价格上涨，芯片股在大幅上涨后下跌：市场结束
summary: Wall Street was rattled by a selloff in chipmakers on concerns over whether massive artificial-intelligence investments will justify lofty valuations while a jump in oil prices boosted bond yields.

title: Traders Hedge for Less Hawkish Fed as Hikes Remain Priced In
title_cn: 由于加息仍被定价，交易员对冲美联储不再强硬的态度
summary: Options traders are increasing bets that the broader market is overestimating how much the Federal Reserve will raise interest rates this year.

title: Volatility in Chip Sector Continues | Closing Bell
title_cn: 芯片行业持续波动|结束钟声
summary: Comprehensive cross-platform coverage of the U.S. market close on Bloomberg Television, Bloomberg Radio, and YouTube with Romaine Bostick, Katie Greifeld, Carol Massar and Emily Graffeo. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: MidEast Still A 'Highly Uncertain Environment' for Oil, Says Daan Struyven
title_cn: 达安·斯特鲁文 (Daan Struyven) 表示，中东仍然是石油“高度不确定的环境”
summary: Daan Struyven, co-head of global commodities research at Goldman Sachs, said that despite a cease fire between the US and Iran and oil tankers moving through the Strait of Hormuz, the risks around oil remain 'very, very significant.' Struyven said that oil import weakness in China is not sustainable and the country will aim to restock their oil supply, as well as turn to other sources of energy in the wake of recent energy supply shock.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Tencent WeChat AI Agent Shows Promise in Super-App Fight: Review
title_cn: 腾讯微信AI代理在超级应用之战中展现出前景：评论
summary: Tencent Holdings Ltd. is fighting to restore its reputation as a tech innovator after falling behind in the race to develop groundbreaking frontier AI models. It’s taking an important step in that direction with Xiaowei: a prototype AI agent that it envisions eventually running errands for a billion-plus users across a WeChat ecosystem spanning millions of apps.

title: Samsung Scales Up Storage Production for Nvidia’s Vera Rubin
title_cn: 三星为 Nvidia 的 Vera Rubin 扩大存储产量
summary: Samsung Electronics Co. has begun mass production of its most advanced data center storage drive, which is set for use inside Nvidia Corp.’s upcoming Vera Rubin platform.

title: Samsung to Get Jump on Apple’s First Foldable With New Phones in July
title_cn: 三星将于 7 月推出首款可折叠新手机，抢占苹果先机
summary: Samsung Electronics Co. will host its next Galaxy Unpacked event on July 22, when the leading foldable phone maker is expected to unveil a Galaxy Z Fold 8 with a shorter and wider design that resembles Apple Inc.’s planned folding iPhone.

title: Billionaires Arrive for the Annual Sun Valley Conference
title_cn: 亿万富翁齐聚太阳谷年度会议
summary: Billionaires descend today on Sun Valley, Idaho, for the Allen & Co. annual gathering of media, technology and finance moguls. Some of the attendees include Hank Paulson, David Zaslav, Neal Mohan and Barry Diller. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Chip Stocks Tumble on AI Anxiety | The Close 7/7/2026
title_cn: 芯片股因人工智能焦虑而暴跌收盘价 7/7/2026
summary: Bloomberg Television brings you the latest news and analysis leading up to the final minutes and seconds before and after the closing bell on Wall Street. Today's guests are Cboe Global Markets VP, Head of Derivatives Market Intelligence Mandy Xu, TeraWulf Chairman & CEO Paul Prager, CFRA Research Equity Research Analyst Keith Snyder, Former NATO Ambassador Kay Bailey Hutchison, JPMorgan Asset Management Global Market Strategist Jordan Jackson, Bernstein Research US Semiconductors Senior Analyst Stacy Rasgon, American Century Investments CEO Jonathan Thomas, Neuberger Private Markets Global Head Tony Tutrone, & Spring Health CEO & Co-Founder April Koh. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Wall Street Unleashes Wave of Bullish SpaceX Ratings
title_cn: 华尔街掀起看涨 SpaceX 评级浪潮
summary: Wall Street’s biggest banks shopped SpaceX shares for $135 a pop during its record initial public offering. Just weeks later, sell-side analysts from many of those same banks are telling clients those shares should be worth $236 each on average.

title: TeraWulf CEO Excited About Anthropic Data Center Agreement
title_cn: TeraWulf 首席执行官对 Anthropic 数据中心协议感到兴奋
summary: TeraWulf CEO Paul Prager says a new 20-year lease agreement with Anthropic is a major vote of confidence in the company’s AI infrastructure strategy. Speaking on "Bloomberg The Close," Prager also discusses plans for a purpose-built AI campus at TeraWulf’s Kentucky site and what the long-term partnership means for future growth. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Democrats Aren't Obstacle For Clarity Act: Cuomo
title_cn: 科莫：民主党人不是澄清法案的障碍
summary:
Andrew Cuomo, former New York governor, joins Katie Greifeld and Isabelle Lee on "Bloomberg Crypto."

 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Andrew Cuomo Discuses Trump Crypto Earnings
title_cn: 安德鲁·科莫讨论特朗普的加密货币收益
summary:
Andrew Cuomo, former New York governor, joins Katie Greifeld and Isabelle Lee on "Bloomberg Crypto." President Trump reported earning at least $1.4 billion in 2025 from crypto and memecoin-related businesses, according to his latest annual financial disclosure.
 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Market Strategist Highlights High Earnings Expectations Amid AI Sector Concentration
title_cn: 市场策略师强调人工智能行业集中度较高的盈利预期
summary: Jordan Jackson, Global Market Strategist at JPMorgan Asset Management, discussed the approaching earnings season and the challenges posed by elevated market expectations. While S&P 500 earnings growth is projected at over 20% for the quarter, excluding technology sectors reduces growth estimates to around 11%, which still represents solid double-digit expansion. He speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Treasuries Slide as Oil Surges, Amazon Sets Jumbo Bond Sale
title_cn: 随着石油价格飙升，美国国债下滑，亚马逊推出巨额债券发售
summary: Treasuries fell as oil prices surged on signs of renewed threats to Middle East supply and Amazon.com led the corporate new-issue with an offering expected to raise at least $25 billion.

title: Traders Dump Tech Bonds to Make Room for Amazon Debt Deal
title_cn: 交易员抛售科技债券，为亚马逊债务交易腾出空间
summary: Amazon.com Inc.’s massive bond sale dragged down hyperscaler debt on Tuesday as investors sold existing securities to fund the new issue, signaling growing fatigue over the barrage of artificial intelligence financings.

title: What China’s Latest Missile Test Reveals About Its Expanding Arsenal
title_cn: 中国最新的导弹试验揭示了其不断扩大的武库
summary: The high-profile launch of a nuclear-capable missile signals a new normal for China’s traditionally secretive military.

title: Bloomberg Crypto 7/7/2026
title_cn: 彭博加密货币 7/7/2026
summary: "Bloomberg Crypto" covers the people, transactions, and technology shaping the world of decentralized finance. Today's guests: Ice-OKX Joint Venture Co-Chair & Former New York Governor Andrew Cuomo, Figure Co-Founder Executive Chairman Mike Cagney, BitGo CEO Michael Belshe, and Lyn Alden Investment Strategy Founder Strategist Lyn Alden. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Circle Under Pressure After Open USD Launch
title_cn: 美元开放后，Circle 面临压力
summary:
Bloomberg Intelligences Dushyant Shahrawat joins Katie Greifeld and Isabelle Lee on "Bloomberg Crypto." Circle shares fell dramatically on last week, after a consortium of firms across payments, finance, tech and crypto — including its distribution partner Coinbase Global Inc. — unveiled a new stablecoin that will compete with Circle’s own.
 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Strategy Sells $216M of Bitcoin as It Begins Overhaul
title_cn: Strategy 在开始改革之际出售了 2.16 亿美元的比特币
summary: Lyn Alden, founder strategist at Lyn Alden Investment Strategy, joins Katie Greifeld and Isabelle Lee on "Bloomberg Crypto." They discuss Michael Saylor’s Strategy, which sold $216 million of Bitcoin last week, marking the first major step in the financing overhaul the company unveiled in recent days after a prolonged slump in the cryptocurrency and its own shares. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Semiconductor Worker Shortfall Endangers US Chip Factory Revival
title_cn: 半导体工人短缺危及美国芯片厂复兴
summary: A growing nationwide shortage of high-skilled workers threatens to delay construction of billions of dollars in new semiconductor plants across the US and constrain future chip production unless the industry pools resources and the government keeps up funding, according to a new report.

title: Job Cuts Were Necessary: BitGo CEO
title_cn: BitGo 首席执行官：裁员是必要的
summary: Mike Belshe, CEO of BitGo, joins Katie Greifeld and Isabelle Lee on "Bloomberg Crypto." The company recently announced a nearly 15% reduction in their workforce. This comes less than six months after the company went public. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Robinhood Rolls Out Perpetual Futures in Europe
title_cn: Robinhood 在欧洲推出永续期货
summary: Bloomberg's Anna Irrera joins Katie Greifeld and Isabelle Lee on "Bloomberg Crypto."  Robinhood is rolling out perpetual futures tied to commodities, ETFs, and currencies in Europe, seeking to capitalize on the rise in round-the-clock trading that’s long been a feature of crypto markets. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: BC Eyes Legal Action Against OpenAI in Wake of Mass Shooting
title_cn: 大规模枪击事件发生后，BC 省拟对 OpenAI 采取法律行动
summary: British Columbia is exploring legal action against OpenAI for its failure to alert authorities to threats made on ChatGPT before the February mass shooting in the town of Tumbler Ridge.

title: We Are A Blockchain Capital Market: Cagney
title_cn: 我们是区块链资本市场：卡格尼
summary:
Mike Cagney, co-founder and executive chairman of Figure, joins Katie Greifeld and Isabelle Lee on "Bloomberg Crypto." Figure Technology is acquiring Kiavi, a leading lender to home flippers and smaller landlords in the US, and forming a joint venture with Sixth Street to buy an accompanying loan portfolio.
 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Andrew Cuomo Discusses OKX, Clarity Act, 24/7 Trading
title_cn: 安德鲁·科莫讨论 OKX、澄清法案、24/7 交易
summary: Andrew Cuomo, former New York governor and co-chair of the ICE-OKX Joint Venture, joins Katie Greifeld and Isabelle Lee on "Bloomberg Crypto." Cuomo is starting a second act: helping cryptocurrency exchange operator OKX and the owner of the New York Stock Exchange build a new business that merges digital and traditional finance markets. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: AI Chip Selloff Spreads Across Global Markets | Bloomberg Tech 7/07/2026
title_cn: AI芯片抛售席卷全球市场彭博科技 7/07/2026
summary: Bloomberg’s Ed Ludlow breaks down Samsung's quarterly profit that surged on memory demand, and why it still wasn't enough for investors. Plus, Amazon is back in the bond market, looking to raise at least $25 billion to fund spending on AI infrastructure; and SpaceX joins the Nasdaq 100 Index as sell-side coverage of Elon Musk's company kicks off. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Amazon Fuels AI Debt Boom With Another Bond Sale
title_cn: 亚马逊再次发行债券，推动人工智能债务繁荣
summary: Amazon is looking to raise at least $25 billion from a US dollar bond sale, marking its latest jumbo debt offering as the tech giant ramps up spending on artificial intelligence infrastructure. Bloomberg Intelligence analyst Robert Schiffman joins Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Bullish on SpaceX Long Term: ERShares' Shulman
title_cn: ERShares 的 Shulman 长期看好 SpaceX
summary: SpaceX is benefiting from a shift towards AI, with broker calls coming out as the company gets included to the Nasdaq 100. This is setting a price floor for a stock that could be headed for the stars, says Joel Shulman, Founder & CIO of ERShares, whose ETF XOVR holds approximately $246 million in SpaceX exposure. He sits down with Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Magnificent Seven Tech Stocks Lose Market Swagger
title_cn: 七大科技股失去市场霸气
summary: For years, the Magnificent Seven tech giants commanded investors’ attention, dominating the S&P 500 Index and determining which way the overall stock market was headed. Those days are over: Bloomberg's Ryan Vlastelica joins Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech" to explain why. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Meta Debuts New AI Image-Generation Model Inside Chatbot, Instagram
title_cn: Meta 在聊天机器人、Instagram 中首次推出新的人工智能图像生成模型
summary: Meta Platforms Inc. debuted a new image-generation artificial intelligence model, its first such release since the company spent billions to rebuild its AI lab under Chief AI Officer Alexandr Wang a year ago.

title: Solstice Buys Element Solutions
title_cn: Solstice 收购 Element Solutions
summary: Element Solutions CEO Ben Gliklich joins Open Interest to break down why Solstice’s $14.5 billion takeover offer was too compelling to pass up, explaining how the combined company could become a bigger player in semiconductor materials, AI data-center cooling and critical US  supply chains. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Michigan Democratic Senate Candidates Debate US-Israel Ties
title_cn: 密歇根州民主党参议员候选人辩论美以关系
summary: The two Michigan Democrats vying for their party’s nomination in a US Senate race clashed in a debate on Tuesday night over Middle East policy, focusing on America’s relations with Israel.

title: Maine Democrats Rule Out Platner Role in Picking Replacement
title_cn: 缅因州民主党人排除普拉特纳在挑选继任者中的作用
summary: Maine’s Democratic Party urged Graham Platner to immediately withdraw from the race for a US Senate seat following allegations of sexual assault and vowed he would have no role in selecting his replacement.

title: Modi Notches Up Global Honors With Another Medal From Indonesia
title_cn: 莫迪荣获印尼另一枚奖章，再添全球荣誉
summary: Another overseas trip, another state honor for Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi.

title: China’s ICBM Tests Point to New Normal Rattling the Pacific
title_cn: 中国的洲际弹道导弹试验预示着太平洋地区的新常态
summary: China’s test this week of a submarine-fired ballistic missile may mark the beginning of more regular Pacific launches as the country advances its arsenal for delivering nuclear warheads, unsettling governments already wary of Beijing’s military buildup.

title: Iran: To Take 'Decisive Actions' to Protect Interests | Balance of Power: Late Edition 07/07/2026
title_cn: 伊朗：采取“果断行动”保护利益权力平衡：最新版 07/07/2026
summary: "Balance of Power: Late Edition" focuses on the intersection of politics and global business. On today's show, Retired General Ben Hodges, former Commanding General for US Army Europe, says NATO allies should increase defense spending to strengthen their own security and counter Russia — not to satisfy President Trump. Bill Scher, Politics Editor for the Washington Monthly and longtime Democratic political strategist and commentator, says Graham Platner's refusal to leave Maine's Senate race could force Democrats into a "game of chicken" before a candidate deadline. Jonathan Panikoff, Senior Director of the Scowcroft Middle East Security Initiative at the Atlantic Council's Middle East Program, reacts to US strikes against Iran after attacks on commercial vessels in the Strait of Hormuz. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Panikoff Says US, Iran Closer to War After Strikes
title_cn: 帕尼科夫称美国和伊朗在袭击后更接近战争
summary: Jonathan Panikoff, Senior Director of the Scowcroft Middle East Security Initiative at the Atlantic Council's Middle East Program, reacts to US strikes against Iran after attacks on commercial vessels in the Strait of Hormuz. He says the US and Iran are "certainly closer" to war, though neither side likely wants a return to full-scale conflict, and warns each escalation makes it harder to restore the cease-fire. He speaks with Kailey Leinz and Joe Mathieu on the late edition of Bloomberg's "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Strategist: Democrats Must Quit Platner to Beat Collins
title_cn: 策略师：民主党必须退出普拉特纳才能击败柯林斯
summary: Bill Scher, Politics Editor for the Washington Monthly and longtime Democratic political strategist and commentator, says Graham Platner's refusal to leave Maine's Senate race could force Democrats into a "game of chicken" before a candidate deadline. He says the party still has a chance against Republican Senator Susan Collins, but only if it unifies around an alternative. He speaks with Kailey Leinz and Joe Mathieu on the late edition of Bloomberg's "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Fmr. General: NATO Spend Shouldn't Be About Pleasing Trump
title_cn: 先生。总则：北约支出不应该是为了取悦特朗普
summary: Retired General Ben Hodges, former Commanding General for US Army Europe, says NATO allies should increase defense spending to strengthen their own security and counter Russia — not to satisfy President Trump. He also says Ukraine's ability to strike deep inside Russia and target its oil-and-gas exports could create a path to victory, if sustained. He speaks with Kailey Leinz and Joe Mathieu on the late edition of Bloomberg's "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Iran Ceasefire Is 'Dead,' Democratic Strategist Hodge Says
title_cn: 民主党策略师霍奇称伊朗停火已“死亡”
summary: Adam Hodge, managing director of Bully Pulpit International, expects the latest US strikes on Iran to further spin out of control into another war on "Balance of Power: Evening Edition." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Warren Queries Ex-Im Bank on Kazakh Venture Tied to Trump Family
title_cn: 沃伦就与特朗普家族有关的哈萨克斯坦企业向进出口银行提出质询
summary: Senator Elizabeth Warren on Tuesday sent a letter to the heads of four federal agencies raising conflict-of-interest concerns about federal funding promised to a little-known US-based company that reportedly has financial ties to President Donald Trump’s family.

title: What New Iran Attacks Means for the Future of the Oil Market
title_cn: 伊朗新的袭击对石油市场的未来意味着什么
summary: The US launched fresh airstrikes on Iran and revoked a waiver that allowed it to sell oil globally. Bloomberg Economics' Chris Kennedy has more on what that means for the future of oil prices "Balance of Power: Evening Edition." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Democratic Senators Probe Scope of Trump’s IRS Immunity Deal
title_cn: 民主党参议员调查特朗普国税局豁免协议的范围
summary: Three Democratic senators are investigating a US government agreement barring past tax probes of President Donald Trump and his businesses, saying they want to determine whether the deal also protects companies affiliated with his family.

title: US Military Forces Launch New Strikes Against Iran
title_cn: 美军对伊朗发动新的打击
summary: The US military said forces have begun carrying out new strikes against Iran after recent attacks on ships transiting the Strait of Hormuz. Kailey Leinz and Joe Mathieu report on "Balance of Power: Evening Edition." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: NATO’s $50 Billion Effort Seeks Deep-Strike Weapons Without US
title_cn: 北约斥资 500 亿美元寻求在美国不参与的情况下打造深度打击武器
summary: The UK, France and Germany have launched a $50 billion NATO initiative to spur the development of long-range weapons without US involvement, aiming to close the gap in an area where Russia is well ahead.

title: Lawsuit Accuses US of Giving Secret Data to Iran on Asylum Seekers
title_cn: 诉讼指控美国向伊朗提供有关寻求庇护者的秘密数据
summary: A lawsuit claims the Trump administration is unlawfully giving confidential personal information to Iran about Iranians who applied for asylum to avoid “grave danger” in their native country.

title: US Military Says It’s Launching New Wave of Strikes Against Iran
title_cn: 美国军方称正在对伊朗发动新一波打击
summary: The US military said forces have begun carrying out new strikes against Iran after recent attacks on ships transiting the Strait of Hormuz, testing an already delicate ceasefire between Washington and Tehran.

title: Jailed Indian Ordered Slaying of Canada Sikh Activist, US Claims
title_cn: 美国声称被监禁的印度下令杀害加拿大锡克教活动人士
summary: US prosecutors charged alleged Indian gang members with directing the 2023 assassination of a prominent Sikh activist in Vancouver, a killing which prompted a diplomatic crisis between India and Canada.

title: Terremotos y todo, los “wildcatters” van tras el petróleo venezolano
title_cn: 地震和一切，“野猫”正在追逐委内瑞拉石油
summary: Mientras que el “Big Oil” titubea, los pequeños productores independientes de crudo trabajan a toda máquina para asegurarse su parte en las enormes reservas de hidrocarburos del país.

title: Merger Suits Stall Under DOJ Boss Who Opposes Blocking Deals
title_cn: 司法部老板反对阻止交易，合并诉讼陷入僵局
summary: Stanley Woodward, who oversees antitrust at the Justice Department, has advocated for a hands-off approach to mergers and privately referred to their reviews largely as a tax on dealmaking, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Oil Wildcatters Seek a Piece of Venezuela Despite Quakes
title_cn: 尽管地震不断，石油野营者仍寻求在委内瑞拉分一杯羹
summary: Independent producers are angling for deals to tap the country's petroleum reserves – and moving faster than Big Oil.

title: Farage Wagers He Can Outrun His Troubles With Election Ploy
title_cn: 法拉奇打赌他可以通过选举策略摆脱困境
summary: Nigel Farage’s shock decision to quit as MP so he can fight again for the seat he won two years ago puts the poll-topping Reform leader back where he’s happiest: at the center of Britain’s attention.

title: Trump’s Top Air Pollution Regulator Is Resigning From EPA
title_cn: 特朗普的最高空气污染监管机构将从美国环保局辞职
summary: The chief air pollution regulator at the US Environmental Protection Agency is resigning.

title: Graham Platner Drama Shows Limits of Pursuing Working-Class Voters
title_cn: 格雷厄姆·普拉特纳的戏剧显示了追求工人阶级选民的局限性
summary: The Democratic nominee for the Maine Senate  race made it this far by appealing to a voter bloc the party wants.

title: Cuba Blames US as It Slowly Restores Power After Mass Blackout
title_cn: 古巴在大规模停电后缓慢恢复供电，指责美国
summary: Cuba restored electricity across about three quarters of its territory more than 24 hours after a nationwide blackout hit the communist-run island, with officials saying a US energy blockade hampered their efforts.

title: SpaceX Joins NASDAQ 100, Chip Stocks Slide | Bloomberg Businessweek Daily 7/7/2026
title_cn: SpaceX 加入纳斯达克 100 指数，芯片股下滑 |彭博商业周刊日报 7/7/2026
summary: Today, Bloomberg's Annmarie Hordern reports from Ankara, Turkey as world leaders, including President Trump, discuss defense at the NATO summit. Then, Bloomberg's Ed Ludlow breaks down the day's tech headlines as tech names drag down the NASDAQ 100. Plus, Wayfair CFO Kate Gulliver talked about the furniture company's move to expand their physical retail footprint. Finally, Citi Wealth head of economics Conrad DeQuadros weighs in on the bond market and his perspective on the US debt to GDP ratio. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Le Pen Says She’ll Run in France’s 2027 Presidential Race
title_cn: 勒庞表示她将参加 2027 年法国总统竞选
summary: Marine Le Pen, France’s far-right leader for two decades, intends to make her fourth presidential run even after an appellate panel ordered her to wear an electronic-monitoring device when it upheld her conviction for misusing public funds.

title: Canadians Skeptical of Carney’s Push to Open Airports to Private Investment
title_cn: 加拿大人对卡尼推动向私人投资开放机场持怀疑态度
summary: A slim majority of Canadians oppose allowing private investment in airports, a new poll shows, as Prime Minister Mark Carney explores selling stakes in the publicly owned facilities to unlock funding for major infrastructure projects.

title: NATO Tries to Keep Trump Onside | Balance of Power 7/7/2026
title_cn: 北约试图让特朗普站在一边权力平衡 7/7/2026
summary: On the early edition of Balance of Power, Bloomberg Washington Correspondents Joe Mathieu and Kailey Leinz discuss the NATO Summit in Ankara. On today's show, Atlantic Council Nonresident Senior Fellow Melinda Haring, Stonecourt Capital Partner Rick Davis, Harvard Kennedy School Ash Center Visiting Democracy Fellow Jeanne Sheehan Zaino and Gulf Oil Chief Energy Advisor Tom Kloza. (Source: Bloomberg)
